creator: olevole@yandex.ru
text:
>skype-devel is known to be broken in more that one way,
>I'm working on some fixes.
>Please try the non-devel port and tell me if you get the same problem.

Hello,

skype non-devel work fine.
I start skype-devel with LD_PRELOAD method:


[root@localhost ~]# pkg_which /usr/compat/linux/lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/librt.so.1
linux_base-fc-4_9

So, original FreeBSD librt.so.1 not work for skype_staticQT-1.3.0.53-generic.tar.bz2
I make change in /usr/X11R6/bin/skype:
---skype---
#!/bin/sh

if [ -r "/usr/compat/linux/lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/librt.so.1" ]; then

export LD_PRELOAD="/usr/compat/linux/lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/librt.so.1 \
/usr/compat/linux/lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/libpthread.so.0 \
/usr/compat/linux/lib/ld-linux.so.2 /usr/compat/linux/lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/libc.so.6"

else
echo Please install emulators/linux_base-fc4 port and try again
exit
fi

SKYPE_RESOURCES_PATH='/usr/X11R6/share/skype' skype_bin "$@" 2>&1 | /usr/bin/grep -v 'SOUND_MIXER_WRITE_IGAIN failed'
--//skype---


and start skype - all ok.
